title: Speedrunner vs Hunters
description: Datapack adding a compass pointing to a specific player. Created specifically for the mini mode
body:
Datapack giving you the opportunity to play the mode Speedrunner vs. Hunters! Get together with friends and distribute roles. To open the settings menu use the command:
- /function svh:gui

In the returned message, press **[+]** to put a point of objection![msg 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/257c25230d51bdae99c970c076a5e26c12987155.png)

In the returned message, press **[+]** so that all players can select their roles!![msg 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d1d16372e95e661646458da866fd8f8d92e672a.png)
